Risk Description: Accounts Payable may experience duplicate invoices if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from duplicate invoices through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Duplicate invoice warning before approval or payment release.
Evidence Required: Store invoice creation, coding, approval, rejection, and payment readiness timestamps.
System/Data Dependency: Odoo Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Supplier master data may require cleansing before controls can operate reliably.

Risk Description: Accounts Payable may experience manual approval chasing if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from manual approval chasing through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Approval threshold control by amount and cost centre.
Evidence Required: Record every approval decision with approver, date, amount, and delegation status.
System/Data Dependency: Odoo Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Purchase order and goods receipt data must be available for three-way match readiness.

Risk Description: Accounts Payable may experience weak supplier master controls if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from weak supplier master controls through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Supplier bank detail change review before first payment after change.
Evidence Required: Keep before-and-after supplier master data values for sensitive changes.
System/Data Dependency: Odoo Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Delegated approval rules must be signed off by finance leadership.

Risk Description: Accounts Payable may experience duplicate invoices if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from duplicate invoices through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Three-way match exception review for PO-backed purchases.
Evidence Required: Preserve evidence links for invoice image, purchase order, goods receipt, and payment batch.
System/Data Dependency: Odoo Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Payment platform integration scope must be confirmed before build.

Risk Description: Accounts Payable may experience manual approval chasing if ownership, data, controls, and evidence are not defined before build.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from manual approval chasing through clear ownership, evidence, and review criteria.
Control Activity: Segregation of duties control between supplier maintenance and payment approval.
Evidence Required: Track exception resolution notes and reviewer sign-off.
System/Data Dependency: Odoo Finance data, required fields, owner status, and evidence references must be available for review.
Residual Risk / Implementation Note: Users need training on exception reason codes to avoid inconsistent reporting.
